issue_summary: JSON Facet perf improvements to support "sweeping" collection of "relatedness()"
javadoc_before:
/**
 * Base class for DV/UIF accumulating counts into an array by ordinal.  It's
 * for {@link org.apache.lucene.index.SortedDocValues} and {@link org.apache.lucene.index.SortedSetDocValues} only.
 * It can handle terms (strings), not numbers directly but those encoded as terms, and is multi-valued capable.
 */
javadoc_after: /** * Base class for DV/UIF accumulating counts into an array by ordinal. It's * for {@link org.apache.lucene.index.SortedDocValues} and {@link org.apache.lucene.index.SortedSetDocValues} only. * It can handle terms (strings), not numbers directly but those encoded as terms, and is multi-valued capable. * By default, this class assumes subclasses can support sweeping collection unless subclasses initialize countAcc directly in their constructors. * * @see SweepingCountSlotAcc */
